classificationPolicy: Destination options are AfroTools car-import coverage priorities, not a legal or tax authority ranking. A country is only marked as a full rule-pack market when a car-import-cost country rule pack exists. Countries without rule packs remain directory/planning coverage and require user overrides for duty, taxes, port, and clearing charges.
sourcePolicy: Do not call a vehicle price, duty, tax, levy, clearing charge, or port fee official unless the specific field has source URL and last-checked metadata. Marketplace samples are market estimates. Expansion catalog rows are research pending until promoted from verified evidence.

sources.notes: Used only as a market-priority reference. OICA publishes some Africa markets individually and aggregates other Africa markets, so this file does not infer official ranks for countries not individually disclosed.
Local data file listing supported car-import country rule-pack JSON files.
Existing 20-market car directory coverage and local-currency estimate policy.
Marketplace and source-market observations. Promotion is blocked unless evidence, normalization, and licensed images are complete.

destinationCountries.name: Nigeria
destinationCountries.notes: Default market because the import-duty calculator is Nigeria-first and the full car-import workspace has a Nigeria rule pack.

destinationCountries.name: Kenya
destinationCountries.notes: Full car-import rule pack exists; compact import-duty mode should deep-link to the Kenya workspace for country-specific logic.

refreshPlan.promotionRule: Only promote rows to master-vehicle-catalog.csv when source-market evidence, local-market evidence, trim normalization, and licensed image status are complete.
